No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Quality Education.reason: The course is advanced tertiary education for graduate students, directly supporting Target 4.3. It also explicitly aims to enhance professional legal knowledge, logical reasoning, and argumentation skills, aligning with Target 4.4.
